calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Purdue Crt.Rpt.: JoAnn Bryce Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Appearances: Arnold Evje,II represents plaintiff, with General Manager Leona Lucket
Defendant Raymond Rendon present, Pro Per

Case settles.
Stipulation to entry of judgment and/or dismissal with prejudice
for restitution and possession of premises located at 405 Valencia Rm 209, forfeiture of rental agreement and back rent and damages from November 16, 2003 thru January 15, 2004 in the amount of $926.00, writ of possession, no stay.
Defendant may remain in the premises if the following terms are met:
1. Payment of $926.00 by January 2, 2204 by the end of business day.
2. Defendant to continue in twelve step program, for at least 12 months and provide evidence of progress.
3. Defendant to continue with out patient program at Fort Miley and provide evidence of progress.
4. Defendant not to disturb the peace of any other occupants.
If the above terms are met, case will be dismissed with prejudice.
If the above terms are not met, plaintiff may proceed on exparte basis for forfeiture and unpaid balence and immediate writ of possession of premises. Defendant waives right to stay. Any personal property left on premises will be disposed. No one else claims right to premisses, except defendant. Each party to pay own costs and fees. Time is of the essence and each term is deemed to be material.
